title: Automation with Item level permissions?
excerpt: It may be that Automation is not working ok with Item level permissions?

posts.author: naamal (Naama)
posts.cookedHtml: It may be that Automation is not working ok with Item level permissions?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @naamal, thanks for writing in about this! You’re right—for the accounts testing item-level permissions in alpha, previously-made automations won’t work. If you write into support@monday.com, happy to give you more information on this!
